message.content:
@startuml
title Create Account

actor "Family Member" as FM1
actor "Family Member" as FM2
rectangle "System" as Sys1
rectangle "System" as Sys2

activate FM1
activate Sys1

FM1 -> Sys1 : 1 create Account
Sys1 --> FM1 : 2 ask for data
FM1 -> Sys1 : 3 input data
Sys1 --> FM1 : 4 inform success

deactivate FM1
deactivate Sys1

FM2
Sys2

@enduml
